text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Early one morning, I notice El Condor Pasa
practicing dance on her own.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
choice_data_list: You're really going at it, huh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! What do you think? Pretty dynamic
dance, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the movements certainly are dynamic, I
can't help but worry that she might run into some
of the other performers during concerts.
choice_data_list:
You should keep in mind that you'll be dancing
with others.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... That does make things difficult. I usually
lose track of my surroundings when I dance alone.
choice_data_list:
Let's dance somewhere where you can keep an
eye on your surroundings.

You should try dancing while looking in a
mirror.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! Somewhere I can watch my surroundings...
Like where?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I've definitely gotta look around me in a place like this...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Geez, it takes way more strength than I expected
to not bump into people...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But! That's exactly why I want to challenge myself!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm the type of gal who always tries to overcome
any obstacle! I'll get better, no matter what!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll show you the best dancin' you've
ever seen! Just you wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I see significant improvement in
her dancing, just as she promised.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So I should watch myself while I dance?
choice_data_list:
You should look yourself in the eye while you
dance.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I see! Just the kind of advice I expect from you,
Trainer! That's something I can practice by myself!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Although, looking into your own eyes while you
dance is pretty intense!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna lose to myself! I can do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, El Condor Pasa practices while gazing
at herself in the mirror until she learns to dance
without hindering others.
